queries.question: What jobs are available for economists and what jobs are available for statisticians working with demographic data?
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE JobPostings.Roles = "Economist" OR JobPostings.Roles = "Statistician" AND JobPostings.Data = "Demographics"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:Title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:Roles ?roles_w .
  ?jobpostings p:Roles ?roles_w2 .
  ?jobpostings p:Data ?data_w .
  FILTER((STR(?roles_w) = "Economist" || (STR(?roles_w2) = "Statistician" && STR(?data_w) = "Demographics")))
}

queries.question: What jobs are available for economists and statisticians working with demographic data?
queries.sql:
SELECT JobPostings.title 
FROM JobPostings
WHERE (JobPostings.Roles = "Economist" OR JobPostings.Roles = "Statistician") AND JobPostings.Data = "Demographics"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?jobpostings a :JobPostings .
  ?jobpostings p:Title ?title .
  ?jobpostings p:Roles ?roles_w .
  ?jobpostings p:Roles ?roles_w2 .
  ?jobpostings p:Data ?data_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?roles_w) = "Economist" || STR(?roles_w2) = "Statistician")) && STR(?data_w) = "Demographics"))
}
